description: old season stocks and Brand wants to pick them up, mail by Dipti.B on  Wed, May 2, 2012 at 10:24 AMComposition White top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck which is slightly scalloped, long sleeves with graphic print, embroidery, buttons and crystal embellishments on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron do not iron on decorations Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this stylish top from doodle. The print with buttons and crystal embellishments adds an element of cuteness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with shorts or a skirt and sandals to complete her look.
